name: Western Union
description_short: 5995 Stage Rd in Bartlett, TN hosts a Western Union for money transfers and check cashing.
description_long:
Western Union at 5995 Stage Rd in Bartlett, TN is a standalone money transfer location open daily from 6 AM to 10 PM. This location serves the greater Bartlett area with convenient access from Stage Road, making it an accessible option for residents and visitors needing money transfer services throughout the day and evening.

This Bartlett location offers Western Union money transfers and check cashing services. Call +1 901-385-7090 to confirm current hours or ask about specific transfer options available at this location. Staff can assist with both domestic and international transfers, as well as check-cashing needs.

If you're in Bartlett and need to send money quickly or cash a check, bring a valid government-issued ID. The extended hours (6 AM–10 PM daily) make it convenient for working residents who need after-hours service, particularly on weekday evenings. Western Union at this Bartlett location offers fast, reliable transfer services to meet your financial needs.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ U.S. locations including major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, Circle K) for convenient cash pickup
24/7 online transfer initiation through WU.com with flexible in-store payment options based on agent hours
Multi-language support (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) serving diverse immigrant communities
Specialized services including mobile top-up, inmate payments, and prepaid card options beyond basic money transfers
Transaction tracking and online account management with Western Union Rewards loyalty program
Flexible delivery methods and ability to update how funds are received by recipients
Money order services available at select locations for additional payment options
cons: Transfer fees and exchange rates are not transparent on the location-finder page and may be higher than alternative money transfer services
Service availability depends on retail partner hours; many locations show extended closures (e.g., not opening until 6-8 AM)
No account or credit-building component; purely transaction-based service without savings or banking functionality
Orange Wallet payment option shows as temporarily unavailable on the website, indicating service disruptions
Requires physical location visit for cash pickup, limiting convenience compared to bank transfers or mobile payment apps
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts needing cash access
Immigrants and expatriates sending money to family internationally or domestically
Individuals needing quick cash transfer without establishing banking relationships or credit
People in areas with limited banking infrastructure but nearby retail agent locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers needing quick access to cash or those sending money internationally, particularly immigrants supporting family abroad. The main caveat is that Western Union charges fees for transfers and offers no credit-building or savings functionality—it is purely a transaction service, not a banking alternative, and relies on physical agent locations that may have limited hours in some areas.
meta_description: Western Union at 5995 Stage Rd, Bartlett, TN. Send money and cash checks with extended daily hours.
